text:
Sourdough Beginner Guide
Are you ready to start making sourdough? This beginner-friendly sourdough guide will walk you through everything you need to know, from how to make a sourdough starter from scratch, answering common sourdough questions and even troubleshooting your sourdough loaves along the way.
Once your starter is active and bubbly, you can bake your first loaf with my easy beginner sourdough bread recipe and explore more simple sourdough recipes that will help you build confidence quickly.
If you’re getting started, here’s a simple list of tools that can help
→ Essential Tools for Sourdough
New to sourdough? Start here!
Make Your First Loaf
Start with my beginner sourdough bread if you’re brand new. Once you’ve made it a few times, move on to my classic artisan-style sourdough bread, which has a bit more technique. If you’re short on time but already understand how sourdough works, my easy sourdough bread is another favorite.
Want Everything in One Place?
If you want a simple, step-by-step way to learn sourdough, my cookbook The Beginner’s Guide to Sourdough walks you through the entire process with easy recipes, clear instructions, and helpful tips. Get your copy here.
Sourdough Discard: What It Is and How to Use It
Sourdough discard is the portion you remove before feeding your starter. Instead of throwing it away, you can use it in everyday discard recipes or learn how to add it to your favorite bakes.
Ready to bake with your sourdough discard? Browse hundreds of sourdough discard recipes and find your next bake.
Making Sourdough Work for You
Learn how to fit sourdough into your routine with a simple timeline, along with adjusting temperature and changing your feeding ratios so you can get more consistent results.
Once you have your routine down, you can start focusing on the details that improve your results.
Top 10 Easy Sourdough Recipes
Not sure what to make with your sourdough starter? This free ebook gives you 10 easy, beginner-friendly recipes you can make right away. 
→ Get the free ebook
What to Learn Next
Take it a step further by learning how to replace yeast with starter and how ingredients impact your dough.
Sourdough Resources & Next Steps
Find answers to common sourdough questions, helpful definitions, and extra guides to support your baking as you keep learning.
Artisan Sourdough Bread Guide
Ready to go beyond the basics? Learn how to understand your dough, improve fermentation, and get more consistent results in this free guide.
→ Artisan Sourdough Bread Guide
What Recipes Should I Start With?
Once you’ve made your first loaf, try these easy recipes to keep building your sourdough skills!
Beginner Sourdough Recipes
These are the best recipes to start with. They’re simple, reliable, and perfect for building confidence as you learn!
Most Popular Sourdough Recipes
The recipes everyone comes back to again and again!
Most Favorite Sourdough Recipes
Extra ideas when you’re ready to explore more – and don’t miss those sourdough cinnamon rolls!
Looking for In-Depth Sourdough instruction?
Ready to make incredible sourdough bread? My online sourdough course includes step-by-step video instruction, a community forum to ask questions, and 15+ PDF recipe downloads. 
→ Check out the free preview 
Still have Sourdough Questions?
Check out my Sourdough FAQ page with frequently asked questions. Come find me on Instagram where I answer sourdough and baking questions frequently. Sign up for my email list where I send sourdough recipes, tips and help you with your bakes. My goal is to help you where you are on your sourdough journey, making sourdough bread approachable and easy to integrate into your life!
Amy Bakes Bread
Welcome!
So glad you’re here!
